name: 27" Geller Counter Height Barstool with Footrest Sheepskin Natural - Threshold™
description:
Add elegance and warmth to your dining ensemble with the Geller Counter-Height "Sheepskin" Bar Stool in Natural from Threshold™. It features an armless design with a subtly angled backrest for comfortable sitting, along with a well-padded seat and footrest bars for the perfect place to sit and enjoy conversation over food or drinks. Complete with a dark finish on the rubberwood frame, and upholstery with a sheepskin-like texture for a soft feel and unique look you’ll love.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.

Overall Width: 21 Inches
Overall Height: 38 Inches
Overall Depth: 22 Inches
